```{=html}
<div class="year-banner"><div class="portrait" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div><div class="year-num">2011</div><div class="year-meta">869 posts this year. Showing first 300.</div></div></div>
```


<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<div id="year-months" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12"], y: [9, 16, 36, 27, 19, 16, 76, 100, 111, 113, 124, 222],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#0A2540" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 30, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      height: 210, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("year-months", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>

Jan 12, 2011  09:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Watch me on Late Night with Jimmy Fallon tomorrow night at 12:35 a.m. on NBC--I&#x27;ll be making a big announcement!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Jan 12, 2011  13:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;This afternoon I&#x27;ll be speaking with Neil Cavuto on Your World with Neil Cavuto</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_25274587486879745" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/25274587486879745" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; America&#x27; s workers need us.&#x27; http://shouldtrumprun.com/&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Feb 22, 2011  13:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Check out today&#x27;s From The Desk Of Donald Trump at http://bit.ly/eXbfOw I&#x27;m willing to answer your questions</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_40131742803169280" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/40131742803169280" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 28, 2011  11:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;ALso coming up: The Celebrity Apprentice returns. Sunday night March 6 at 9 pm EST http://www.nbc.com/the-apprentice/&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_42278544969179136" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/42278544969179136" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 28, 2011  15:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Check out today&#x27;s video blog http://bit.ly/g75Jiu I want to answer more of your questions</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_42341540923838464" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/42341540923838464" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 01, 2011  18:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I answered some of your questions in today&#x27;s video... http://bit.ly/exviyc&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_42736468908707840" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/42736468908707840" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 02, 2011  09:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I was on the TODAY Show this morning and then visited Regis &amp; Kelly. The Celebrity Apprentice starts this Sunday night‚Äîdon‚Äôt miss it!&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_42974429189390336" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/42974429189390336" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 03, 2011  08:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I appeared on David Letterman last night. And don&#x27;t forget Sunday night---the first episode of Celebrity Apprentice will be on NBC at 9 pm.&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_43322777758990336" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/43322777758990336" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_43690210873180160" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/43690210873180160" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 07, 2011  16:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My thoughts on last night&#x27;s Celebrity Apprentice http://bit.ly/eWM4T2 also an observation I made recently http://bit.ly/hQJERE&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_44886512780836864" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/44886512780836864" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #C9A961" data-theme="nicknames_good" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 08, 2011  14:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;More of your questions answered in today&#x27;s video at http://bit.ly/f91yLo Also here is my appearance on Neil Cavuto http://bit.ly/erRuo8&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_45222588791795712" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/45222588791795712" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_45954380691812352" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/45954380691812352" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 11, 2011  14:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Don&#x27;t forget to tune in to the Celebrity Apprentice this Sunday night</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_46307259835359233" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/46307259835359233" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 14, 2011  15:15</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My thoughts on last night&#x27;s Celebrity Apprentice http://bit.ly/hiolBJ as well as my latest video blog at http://bit.ly/gKJL8x&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_47390506715578370" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/47390506715578370" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 14, 2011  16:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Tweet me more of your questions to answer in the next video....&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_47403593816481792" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/47403593816481792" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 15, 2011  09:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Watch as I humiliate a dais full of &#x27;talent.&#x27; # TrumpRoast airs tonight at 10:30/9:30c on Comedy Central http://bit.ly/fugbyy&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_47667623525224448" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/47667623525224448" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 15, 2011  09:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Hey @ SnoopDogg @ ItstheSituation @ SethMacFarlane: Oh</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_47672443254476800" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/47672443254476800" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 15, 2011  09:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Hey @ realjeffreyross @ whitney cummings @ lisalampanelli: you call yourselves comedians? # TrumpRoast tonight 10:30/9:30c on @ ComedyCentral.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_47673273869283328" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/47673273869283328" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_47682098504540160" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/47682098504540160" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 15, 2011  15:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Keep talking about me: use # TrumpRoast to tweet about how good I look on @ ComedyCentral tonight at 10:30/9:30c http://bit.ly/hN3jow&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_47755962928463872" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/47755962928463872" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 16, 2011  11:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Some of your most popular questions answered in today&#x27;s video http://bit.ly/gv6TVh&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_48052023484092417" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/48052023484092417" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 16, 2011  14:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ shouldtrumprun Hundreds of thousands of supporters have already gone to and joined the movement at shouldtrumprun.com Have you?&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_48100699418005504" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/48100699418005504" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 16, 2011  15:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Catch me on Fox News right now</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_48121239134412801" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/48121239134412801" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 17, 2011  10:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Check out my interview on @ GMA http://abcn.ws/ib1t1c&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_48410117615525888" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/48410117615525888" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 17, 2011  14:29</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I&#x27;ll be on with Larry Kudlow of the Kudlow Report tonight on CNBC at 7 p.m. We&#x27;ll be discussing current affairs and politics. Tune in.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_48466060738965504" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/48466060738965504" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 18, 2011  08:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Comedy Central Roast of Donald Trump last week was the #1 highest rated Comedy Central Roast ever...it brought in 3.5 milion viewers&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_48734756329881600" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/48734756329881600" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 18, 2011  08:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Don&#x27;t forget the Celebrity Apprentice</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_48736451654975488" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/48736451654975488" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 21, 2011  08:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I spoke with Fox and Friends today watch here http://bit.ly/fMNVbx&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_49829845122826243" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/49829845122826243" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 21, 2011  10:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Here are my thoughts on last night&#x27;s episode of The Celebrity Apprentice... http://bit.ly/hBTQXG&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_49857555257765888" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/49857555257765888" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 21, 2011  12:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I want to see people make lots of $$ and live better lives. I really think they can do that through TheTrumpNetwork http://trumpnetwork.com/&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_49887944063991808" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/49887944063991808" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; It&#x27;s an episode you&#x27;ll want to see---and one you won&#x27;t forget!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_53814505121120257" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/53814505121120257" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 05, 2011  16:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Check out video of today&#x27;s press conference at Trump Tower where the driver of the # Indy500 Pace Car was announced... http://bit.ly/flMhJG&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_55383202570846209" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/55383202570846209" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 07, 2011  14:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I was featured on the @ todayshow this morning and was interviewed by @ meredithvieira. In case you missed it... http://on.today.com/gaS1hc&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_56071102593634304" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/56071102593634304" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #C9A961" data-theme="nicknames_good" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 07, 2011  15:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ The_Choirboy @ Shampa525 @ mcleeoo @ the_impetuous @ rdercjr Your questions were answered in my # trumpvlog watch here... http://bit.ly/favgFU&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_56092783328505856" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/56092783328505856" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 07, 2011  15:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I really enjoyed answering your tweets http://bit.ly/favgFU Please send more and I will answer them in the next # trumpvlog&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_56096015937310720" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/56096015937310720" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 13, 2011  14:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Guests are raving about our exclusive hotel mattress and so we‚Äôve made it available for purchase! http://bit.ly/sertahotel&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_69120590535081987" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/69120590535081987" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 16, 2011  13:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;This has been a very difficult decision regarding the Presidential run and I want to thank all my twitter fans for your fantastic support.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_70198822797717504" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/70198822797717504" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 17, 2011  16:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Vote for the next Miss USA... http://bit.ly/lxobOm # VEGASusa11 # MissUSA&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_70597171606589440" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/70597171606589440" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 19, 2011  08:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Check out today&#x27;s # trumpvlog about the upcoming episode of @ ApprenticeNBC.... http://bit.ly/jyfGP3 # celebrityapprenticefinale&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_71208272971042816" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/71208272971042816" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 20, 2011  10:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Get ready for some excitement--the live finale of the Celebrity Apprentice is on this Sunday night --don&#x27;t miss it! http://bit.ly/bnAuAv&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_71605451581693952" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/71605451581693952" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 23, 2011  11:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My appearance on @ foxandfriends from today.... http://bit.ly/lodlDT&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_72694120853946368" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/72694120853946368" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 23, 2011  11:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congratulations to John Rich and to Marlee Matlin for a terrific job throughout the season. You are both great! http://bit.ly/bnAuAv&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_72698837889847297" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/72698837889847297" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #C9A961" data-theme="nicknames_good" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 25, 2011  08:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thanks for all of your tremendous support over the past few months</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_73387386599505920" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/73387386599505920" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 26, 2011  17:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ TheRealMissUSA and the 2011 contestants stopped by Trump Tower yesterday</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_73872324587302913" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/73872324587302913" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 24, 2011  15:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ GolfMagazine is having an online competition - vote‚Ä¶ http://bit.ly/jKyS99&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_84362886398480384" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/84362886398480384" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 27, 2011  09:15</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I was in San Jose</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_85350547737161728" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/85350547737161728" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 27, 2011  10:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Did my weekly phoner on Fox &amp; Friends this morning...sounding off on issues of the day ... http://fxn.ws/kje8Yi&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_85365407074107392" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/85365407074107392" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 01, 2011  11:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Please read http://on.wsj.com/mxrFUC</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_86837568301318145" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/86837568301318145" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 01, 2011  11:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Wishing everyone a wonderful Independence Day holiday weekend</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_86840090617323520" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/86840090617323520" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 05, 2011  13:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Tomorrow we&#x27;ll be going to Panama for the opening of our new hotel. It&#x27;s a fantastic building in a fantastic location. http://bit.ly/jkC0ea&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_88309219425656832" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/88309219425656832" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 05, 2011  14:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Perhaps this is the kind of thinking we need in Washington ... http://on.wsj.com/ldLEoy&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_88334210636595200" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/88334210636595200" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 06, 2011  09:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congress is back.TIME TO CUT</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_88617765589630976" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/88617765589630976" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 07, 2011  11:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Republicans should not negotiate against themselves again with @ BarackObama in today&#x27;s debt talks--First and foremost CUT</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_89005019432620032" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/89005019432620032" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 07, 2011  11:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;THe Art of the Deal--&#x27;The best thing you can do is deal from strength</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_89005438619758592" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/89005438619758592" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 07, 2011  11:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;If only @ Obama was as focused on balancing the budget as he is on weakening Israel&#x27;s borders then America would be on the path to solvency.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_89005918376833025" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/89005918376833025" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 08, 2011  10:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@johnboehner Message for House GOP &#x27;The worst thing you can possibly do in a deal is seem desperate to make it.&#x27; - The Art of the Deal.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_89351582935810048" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/89351582935810048" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 08, 2011  10:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ Obama - Iranian weapons killing Americans in Iraq? What are u doing about this?http://bit.ly/olNqW5&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_89353664183013376" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/89353664183013376" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 08, 2011  11:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;ObamaCare Tragedy Primed to Further Explode the Deficit http://bit.ly/q2iYtw And @ Obama transferred $500 billion from Medicare to fund it!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_89368771428499456" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/89368771428499456" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 14, 2011  16:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;What is better advice- &#x27;The Art of the Deal&#x27; or &#x27;Rules for Radicals&#x27;? I know which one @ BarackObama prefers.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_91615964004753409" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/91615964004753409" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 15, 2011  09:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Who will be the next @ TheRealTeenUSA? Find out this Saturday at 8PM ET on missteenusa.com # TeenUSA&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_91874081376452608" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/91874081376452608" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 15, 2011  14:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ BarackObama You have increased discretionary spending by 25% annually and amassed over $4 trillion in debt. T-E-Ahttp://on.wsj.com/onsY3b&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_91951062285684736" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/91951062285684736" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 15, 2011  14:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ marcorubio is right. We need to create more taxpayers</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_91954652018511873" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/91954652018511873" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 18, 2011  08:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congratulations to my daughter Ivanka and her husband Jared on the birth of their daughter Arabella Rose yesterday.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_92955253808439296" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/92955253808439296" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 18, 2011  10:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;# trumpvlog The Republicans must act now</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_92981238880681984" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/92981238880681984" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 18, 2011  11:21</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ BarackObama has sold guns to Mexican drug lords while his DOJ erodes our 2nd Amendment rights.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_92992501585162240" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/92992501585162240" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 18, 2011  13:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Every dollar @ BarackObama spends costs $1.40 with interest borrowed from China on our children and grandchildren&#x27;s backs. CUT-CAP-BALANCE!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_93030160189763584" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/93030160189763584" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 18, 2011  14:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The GOP doesn&#x27;t waste an opportunity to waste an opportunity. Defunding Obamacare should be central to any deal.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_93044431564972032" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/93044431564972032" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 19, 2011  08:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;So China is ordering us to raise the Debt Limit...How low have we as a nation sunk?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_93306458074132481" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/93306458074132481" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 19, 2011  10:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@johnboehner @ EricCantor &#x27;You can&#x27;t con people...if you don&#x27;t deliver the goods</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_93340947483607041" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/93340947483607041" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 19, 2011  12:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;While @ BarackObama seeks to further destroy our credit</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Jul 19, 2011  14:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;http://onforb.es/cDzmaN http://onforb.es/cDzmaN Obamacare is The Biggest Tax Increase In U.S. History--repeal it as part of any deal.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_93409358674796544" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/93409358674796544" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; His record proves it.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_93768615358251008" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/93768615358251008" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; ANY DEAL NEEDS TO REPEAL OBAMACARE. Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_94482776199397376" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/94482776199397376" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 25, 2011  09:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Ronald Kessler&#x27;s new book &#x27;The Secrets of the FBI&#x27; is a great book that should be read by everyone.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_95497050229182464" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/95497050229182464" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 25, 2011  09:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Unfortunately@BarackObama&#x27;s continued attack on the US $ will lead to ever rising gas prices at the pump and lots of other really bad things&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_95502672874057728" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/95502672874057728" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 25, 2011  10:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We need a balanced budget Amendment because Congress has no fiscal discipline.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_95521587649974273" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/95521587649974273" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 25, 2011  13:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Answer to both Social Security and Medicare is a robust growing economy---not cuts on the elderly.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_95563593222860800" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/95563593222860800" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 25, 2011  14:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The pressure on the debt ceiling is on @ BarackObama.... http://bit.ly/qjI442 # trumpvlog&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_95579450183385090" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/95579450183385090" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_95847438379794433" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/95847438379794433" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot;
