Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_95857790689607681" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/95857790689607681" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 26, 2011  11:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My thoughts on the situation in Norway and Amanda Knox... http://bit.ly/nUTNVB # trumpvlog&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_95898851373887489" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/95898851373887489" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 26, 2011  12:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My interview from yesterday on Fox and Friends -- &#x27;GOP Crazy If They Don&#x27;t Get Everything They Want&#x27; http://bit.ly/nKsBBF&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_95906323169951744" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/95906323169951744" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 26, 2011  14:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;America&#x27;s debt is greater than our GDP. Time for new thinking.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_95932236490223616" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/95932236490223616" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 27, 2011  08:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;China has so much of our debt that they can&#x27;t put us in default w/o killing themselves---US needs our toughest negotiator---and fast!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_96213917306597377" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/96213917306597377" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 27, 2011  10:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Higher Taxes kill job creation---cut wild government spending and waste.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_96237915633483776" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/96237915633483776" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 27, 2011  10:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Watch my wife Melania Trump tonight on @ QVC at 1 a.m. So proud of her!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_96247777041981440" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/96247777041981440" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 27, 2011  13:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;Know when to walk away from the table.&#x27; The Art of the Deal&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_96284991041974273" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/96284991041974273" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 27, 2011  15:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;People ask me every day to pose for pictures but the camera never works the first time--they are never prepared or maybe just very nervous!&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_96311241231962112" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/96311241231962112" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 28, 2011  10:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My interview yesterday from Newsmax - &#x27;Obama Is &#x27;Now Totally Lost</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_96604926230282243" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/96604926230282243" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 28, 2011  12:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ KarlRove&#x27;s @ CrossroadsGPS new ad criticizes Obama for his excessive spending and debt</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_96640218513412096" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/96640218513412096" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 28, 2011  13:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Please tweet me your questions to answer in my # trumpvlog.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_96647705408974848" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/96647705408974848" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 28, 2011  14:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@Johnboehner &#x27;The worst thing you can possibly do in a deal is seem desperate to make it.&#x27; --The Art of the Deal&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_96665829722165248" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/96665829722165248" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 28, 2011  14:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My wife Melania Trump&#x27;s show was a tremendous success last night. In case you missed her</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_96668126091022337" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/96668126091022337" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 28, 2011  15:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ BarackObama has not released his own debt plan yet. He&#x27;s totally lost</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_96680585451421696" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/96680585451421696" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 29, 2011  11:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Blue Ribbon Commission to find and agree to future spending cuts? Bad idea.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_96987458432020480" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/96987458432020480" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 29, 2011  14:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;If Obama has to re-fight this fight next year he loses -- &#x27;Watch the fine details in every deal&#x27; -- The Art of the Deal&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_97019390637244417" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/97019390637244417" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 01, 2011  09:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Disappointed in GOP and Dems---Giving Obama power to raise the debt limit next year is a mistake.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Aug 01, 2011  10:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;This is the best deal the Republicans could get?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_98055725728792578" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/98055725728792578" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 01, 2011  11:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Why should we have any defense cuts in any deal? America must remain strong.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_98075199966162945" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/98075199966162945" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #997A2E" data-theme="trade" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 01, 2011  12:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;How does this deal help strengthen the US?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_98090139053596672" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/98090139053596672" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 02, 2011  15:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;No taxes the only good thing about DC Debt Deal.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_98486403964481536" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/98486403964481536" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 03, 2011  08:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;All those politicians in Washington and not one good negotiator.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_98748296348184577" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/98748296348184577" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 03, 2011  09:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Wake Up America -- China is eating our lunch.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_98764168760532992" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/98764168760532992" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 03, 2011  10:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I believe America can be great only with proper leadership.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_98783201190875136" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/98783201190875136" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 03, 2011  12:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Republicans gave Obama a free pass to the White House -- they just don&#x27;t get it.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_98811808374194177" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/98811808374194177" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 03, 2011  14:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Morning Joe Panel is stealing many of my statements and ideas to better America without giving credit -- the story of my life!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Aug 03, 2011  14:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Today&#x27;s # trumpvlog answers your tweets about my thoughts on the Republican candidates...http://bit.ly/pyrgoL&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Aug 03, 2011  16:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Watch my interview with Greta Van Susteren on her show</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_98869294837940224" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/98869294837940224" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_99111356959162368" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/99111356959162368" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_99129433687986178" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/99129433687986178" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 04, 2011  12:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;America&#x27;s debt officially became 100% of our GDP on @ BarackObama&#x27;s 50th birthday---coincidence?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_99173967457296384" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/99173967457296384" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 04, 2011  15:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;China demanded that we raise our debt ceiling and then their rating agency downgraded us. Our leaders are hope‚Ä¶ (cont) http://deck.ly/~x0TDx&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Aug 05, 2011  10:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;In today&#x27;s # trumpvlog I answer your questions about what you should be doing in this uncertain economy... http://bit.ly/nPFt9N&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Aug 05, 2011  13:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The new President of OPEC is Mahmoud Ahmadinejad‚Äôs confidant Rostam Ghasemi</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_99540728077758464" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/99540728077758464" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 08, 2011  10:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The S&amp;P downgrade is a direct result of @ BarackObama&#x27;s increased reckless budget spending and Obama Care. He owns this.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_100585254401748992" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/100585254401748992" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 08, 2011  15:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;He&#x27;s hired! Aug 09, 2011  12:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The S&amp;P are losers. They did this for personal publicity in order to straighten out their terrible reputatio‚Ä¶ (cont) http://deck.ly/~PgL6v&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_100984825103663104" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/100984825103663104" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 09, 2011  14:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Republicans and Democrats should get back to work immediately to work on resolving downgrade. This is not a go‚Ä¶ (cont) http://deck.ly/~1UpEp&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_101007545338044416" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/101007545338044416" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_101013255950053376" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/101013255950053376" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 09, 2011  16:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Listen in live NOW to the new radio show @ AmericaNowRadio as my # Apprentice Andy and I tell it like it is 6PM EThttp://goo.gl/AMNEE&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_101049703684259841" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/101049703684259841" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 10, 2011  10:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ BarackObama took another swipe at the State of Israel for building in their capital Jerusalem on a Jewish hol‚Ä¶ (cont) http://deck.ly/~7QsGg&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_101311625432268801" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/101311625432268801" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 10, 2011  12:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congress should get back to Washington</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_101337555391365120" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/101337555391365120" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 10, 2011  13:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Oil is starting to rise again despite the horrible times. OPEC continues to rip us off. Not worth $30. New leadership needed.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_101358470187589632" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/101358470187589632" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 10, 2011  14:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Fed continues to flood the market with US dollars. Wrong move.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_101373840323645440" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/101373840323645440" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_101455389928857601" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/101455389928857601" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 11, 2011  11:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I was on CNBC this morning talking about the market and America&#x27;s financial future http://bit.ly/rsBqmE&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_101684911563489281" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/101684911563489281" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 11, 2011  13:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Looking forward to the GOP debate and the outcome of the Ames straw poll. We must get a real leader.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_101721150199046144" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/101721150199046144" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 11, 2011  16:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;How will Mitt Romney defend his record on jobs and Romneycare in tonight&#x27;s debate?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_101770122296958976" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/101770122296958976" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 12, 2011  10:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;It&#x27;s easy to see why Americans are sick of career politicians and both parties.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_102040826452000768" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/102040826452000768" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 12, 2011  10:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My interview on @ AmericaNowRadio with Andy Dean. Andy was a contestant on the second season of The Apprentic‚Ä¶ (cont) http://deck.ly/~AS2u1&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_102046106262831104" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/102046106262831104" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 12, 2011  13:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Obama has no understanding of how to create jobs or opportunity. He believes in Government.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_102079394448814080" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/102079394448814080" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 13, 2011  08:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Ron Paul is right that we are wasting trillions of dollars in Iraq and Afghanistan.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_102371063723343873" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/102371063723343873" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 13, 2011  13:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Economic growth can save Social Security</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_102439965329330176" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/102439965329330176" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 15, 2011  10:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Reporters say it&#x27;s the Trump Bump---I tell CNBC I am buying stocks--- and the market goes up.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_103131233285976064" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/103131233285976064" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 15, 2011  12:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ BarackObama played golf yesterday. Now he heads to a 10 day vacation in Martha&#x27;s Vineyard. Nice work ethic.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_103158206498476032" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/103158206498476032" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 15, 2011  13:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My thoughts on the Republican Party in today&#x27;s # trumpvlog... http://bit.ly/rdP9bu&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_103169584491798528" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/103169584491798528" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 15, 2011  13:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Unemployment is plaguing both Black and Hispanic youths. Very troubling.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_103174427906277376" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/103174427906277376" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 15, 2011  14:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;China is a threat to America. Aug 18, 2011  12:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Karl Rove --lost GOP both Houses of Congress and the White House--gave us Obama.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp;
