Aug 18, 2011  13:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Many people have been asking to see my plane</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_104251305844944897" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/104251305844944897" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 18, 2011  14:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Insurgents in Iraq show they can still mount horrifying attacks---US wastes trillions.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_104275375131074560" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/104275375131074560" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 19, 2011  10:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;You can listen to my interview today with Jay Sekulow Live and the @ JordanSekulow show here http://aclj.org/ @ 12PM EST.&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_104569407761690624" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/104569407761690624" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 19, 2011  13:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ BarackObama‚Äôs new job plan will certainly do the following ‚Äì 1. Not create any jobs. 2. Borrow more money from China.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_104624327122616322" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/104624327122616322" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 19, 2011  14:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ BarackObama is sure a master delegator. He has sent @ Joe_Biden to China. The Chinese are laughing at us. We MUST do better.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_104641580895453184" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/104641580895453184" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 22, 2011  10:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Israel is being barraged by rockets from Gaza recently. They must respond accordingly in defense of their citizens.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_105668901668532224" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/105668901668532224" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 22, 2011  12:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;While @ BarackObama continues to defend ObamaCare in the courts</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_105699355494846467" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/105699355494846467" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 22, 2011  13:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We should have told the so-called rebels ‚ÄúWe will only help if you give us 50% of your oil.‚Äù http://bit.ly/nxKJ0Q # trumpvlog&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_105715819840929792" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/105715819840929792" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 22, 2011  15:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We don&#x27;t need another stimulus. The first one was a complete failure. Why repeat the same mistake?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_105739460074938368" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/105739460074938368" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 23, 2011  09:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ RonPaul has some serious ideas which deserve serious consideration. Wrong for media to ignore him.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_106011126889852928" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/106011126889852928" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 23, 2011  10:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We spent over a billion on Libya and lead the way---why is Europe getting the oil?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_106032417000800257" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/106032417000800257" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 23, 2011  12:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Let&#x27;s not start celebrating over Libya until we see who takes over.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_106061196804890624" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/106061196804890624" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 23, 2011  14:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;As bad as Qaddafi was---what comes next in Libya will be worse---just watch.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_106084327581949952" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/106084327581949952" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 24, 2011  09:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Just as I predicted</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_106375487756046336" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/106375487756046336" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 24, 2011  13:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We have spent over $1 Billion on the Libya operation. What are we getting back?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_106426270891507712" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/106426270891507712" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 24, 2011  14:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;There usually is an easy solution to every problem. For instance</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_106442599031783424" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/106442599031783424" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 25, 2011  10:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ BarackObama inherited $10.6 Trillion in National Debt---will leave after his first term with the Debt at over $17.6 Trillion.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_106756439414030336" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/106756439414030336" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 25, 2011  12:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;China&#x27;s corporate espionage is a continued threat to the American economy. With the right leadership</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_106776880354557953" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/106776880354557953" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #997A2E" data-theme="trade" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 25, 2011  13:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;America needs a President who can negotiate better deals for the American People.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_106800317403897857" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/106800317403897857" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 25, 2011  15:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I&#x27;m very proud of the work my son @ EricTrump has been doing with the @ EricTrumpFDN</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_106818789676552192" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/106818789676552192" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 26, 2011  09:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Why did @ BarackObama and his family travel separately to Martha&#x27;s Vineyard? They love to extravagantly spend on the taxpayers&#x27; dime.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_107091854092279808" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/107091854092279808" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 26, 2011  11:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;There is no substitute for private sector experience.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_107121438657478656" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/107121438657478656" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 26, 2011  13:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;More and more Americans seem fed up with both Parties----I agree.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_107151197537976322" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/107151197537976322" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 26, 2011  13:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Hurricane Irene and Libya in today&#x27;s # trumpvlog....http://bit.ly/opfTwA&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_107161718572072960" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/107161718572072960" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 26, 2011  13:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Libyan Rebels should have given us 50% of the oil in return for our military support---we don&#x27;t even ask!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_107164909812453376" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/107164909812453376" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 29, 2011  10:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Iran admits to aiding the Libyan &#x27;Rebels&#x27; and Ahmadinejad received a letter of thanks - when will Washington learn? http://bit.ly/paSPy1&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_108202057441345536" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/108202057441345536" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 29, 2011  11:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ BarackObama MUST release a budget before @johnboehner begins negotiations on a continuing appropriations resolution.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_108208835856056320" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/108208835856056320" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 29, 2011  13:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Crude is at $85 right now ‚Äì isn‚Äôt even worth half that. OPEC is ripping us off.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_108247453551177728" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/108247453551177728" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 29, 2011  17:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;If the Palestinians want statehood then why are they run by the terrorist group Hamas?&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_108306883194011648" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/108306883194011648" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 30, 2011  11:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;If the UN unilaterally grants the Palestinians statehood</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_108570669423394816" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/108570669423394816" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 30, 2011  12:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;ObamaCare must be fully repealed or it will destroy America&#x27;s small businesses.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_108592737472880640" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/108592737472880640" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 30, 2011  14:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The new Libyan Government should turn over the Lockerbie bomber---now.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_108615001102761984" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/108615001102761984" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 30, 2011  14:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;China&#x27;s business interests reach far and wide---even domestically within our borders. We need to reassess our relationship.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_108628640744484864" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/108628640744484864" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 31, 2011  09:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ BarackObama transparently had ATF head Kenneth Melson resign yesterday....Fast and Furious obviously goes all the way to the White House.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_108916389519163392" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/108916389519163392" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 31, 2011  10:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My thoughts on Dick Cheney and his new book‚Ä¶ http://bit.ly/mTUnaU # trumpvlog&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_108920528286400512" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/108920528286400512" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 31, 2011  11:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Libya is being taken over by Islamic radicals---with @ BarackObama&#x27;s open support.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_108933866936475648" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/108933866936475648" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 31, 2011  13:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;With gas prices rising and the economy failing</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_108962732816072704" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/108962732816072704" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 31, 2011  14:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I&#x27;ll be on Greta Van Susteren&#x27;s show tonight at 10 PM on FoxNews. Tune in.&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_108989499421368320" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/108989499421368320" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 01, 2011  09:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We must stand firm against the UN&#x27;s ploy to sabotage Israel---if the UN grants the PA statehood then we must immediately defund it.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_109274621198610433" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/109274621198610433" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article></div><script src="../assets/filter.js"></script>
```
